text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp begins. Meisho Doto is planning to
spend her stay discreetly, not wanting to bother
the talented T.M. Opera O and Admire Vega.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, reality far exceeds Meisho Doto's
expectations—her peers, in full acknowledgment
of her skills, welcome her into the group. Meisho
Doto couldn't be happier.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their summertime kicks off with an unexpected
friend—a tanuki—coming along and quickly
warming up to Doto.
